title: Advancements+ Datapack
description: A Minecraft Datapack that adds some useful Advancements!
body:
**This Project will not Recieve Updates because there are better Advancements datapacks out there and the developer couldnt find any better ideas for new advancements.**

# Advancements+

Advancements+ is a custom datapack that supercharges your Minecraft journey by adding new, meaningful advancements to the game! Whether you’re a hardcore survivalist, an explorer, or just a casual player, this pack gives you fresh goals, exciting challenges, and new bragging rights.

Perfect for SMPs or solo worlds, it blends seamlessly with the vanilla experience while giving you more to strive for.

## 🧠 Features

- ✅ 5 brand new advancements (More coming Soon!)
- ✅ Custom triggers for creative goals
- ✅ Tweaked existing paths for smoother progression
- ✅ Fully compatible with vanilla gameplay
- ✅ No mods required – drop it in and go!

## ⚙️ Installation

1.    Download the .zip file

2.    Drop it into your world’s datapacks folder

3.    Use /reload in-game

4.    Check out the new advancements tab and start grinding!

>  💡 Works with multiplayer too! Just make sure to reload the server after installing.
